description: Maps DeepInspect's 14 visual defect categories to dacl10k's 19 semantic segmentation classes (WACV 2024)
target_paper: Flotzinger et al. (2024) WACV — dacl10k: Benchmark for Semantic Bridge Damage Segmentation
notes: dacl10k uses pixel-level semantic segmentation. DeepInspect uses element-level scoring.
Mappings show which dacl10k classes are evidence sources for each DeepInspect defect category.
One DeepInspect category may map to multiple dacl10k classes (evidence aggregation).
One dacl10k class may contribute to multiple DeepInspect categories (shared evidence).
Confidence modifier: if the mapped dacl10k class is detected in the image, it increases confidence in the DeepInspect defect category assessment.

deepinspect_to_dacl10k.deepinspect_description: Cracks in concrete or steel elements visible from street level

dacl10k_notes.crack: Primary evidence for linear cracking in concrete/masonry elements
dacl10k_notes.alligator_crack: Map-cracking pattern indicating advanced deterioration, ASR, or freeze-thaw damage

deepinspect_to_dacl10k.confidence_modifier: high — crack presence is visually unambiguous when present

deepinspect_to_dacl10k.deepinspect_description: Loss of concrete cover exposing aggregate or reinforcement

dacl10k_notes.damaged_concrete: More advanced spalling with structural material loss

deepinspect_to_dacl10k.deepinspect_description: Reinforcing steel visible due to cover loss, with or without active corrosion

dacl10k_notes.exposed_reinforcement: Direct 1:1 correspondence. Presence automatically scores this criterion at minimum 4.0 (HIGH).

deepinspect_to_dacl10k.score_floor_rationale: Exposed reinforcement indicates cover failure and active corrosion risk — always at least HIGH severity

deepinspect_to_dacl10k.deepinspect_description: Rust staining, section loss, or active corrosion of steel elements

dacl10k_notes.corrosion_stain: Rust bleeding from reinforcement or structural steel — evidence of active corrosion
dacl10k_notes.paint_failure: Coating breakdown exposing steel to corrosive environment — leading indicator
dacl10k_notes.exposed_reinforcement: Severe corrosion stage — rebar fully exposed

deepinspect_to_dacl10k.confidence_modifier: medium — corrosion extent hard to judge from street-level imagery

deepinspect_to_dacl10k.deepinspect_description: White salt deposits indicating water migration through concrete

dacl10k_notes.efflorescence: Direct 1:1 — white calcium carbonate deposits from water migration
dacl10k_notes.wetness: Active water ingress — efflorescence precursor or accompaniment
dacl10k_notes.surface_staining: Broader staining category that includes efflorescence

deepinspect_to_dacl10k.confidence_modifier: medium — efflorescence indicates water pathway but not severity of source defect

deepinspect_to_dacl10k.deepinspect_description: General surface deterioration including delamination, scaling, and weathering

dacl10k_notes.concrete_deterioration: General surface breakdown without clear primary mechanism
dacl10k_notes.surface_staining: Discoloration indicating chemical attack or water
dacl10k_notes.restained_area: Areas repaired or stained from previous repair — signs of maintenance history

deepinspect_to_dacl10k.deepinspect_description: Visible geometric deformation, settlement, tilt, or unusual deflection
deepinspect_to_dacl10k.dacl10k_notes_general: dacl10k does not include a deformation/settlement class. Structural deformation must be assessed from geometric cues in street imagery, not from dacl10k segmentation.
deepinspect_to_dacl10k.confidence_modifier: low — geometric deformation assessment from 2D imagery is unreliable

deepinspect_to_dacl10k.deepinspect_description: Blocked, damaged, or inadequate drainage elements

dacl10k_notes.drainage_issue: Direct 1:1 — blocked drains, standing water, damaged downpipes
dacl10k_notes.vegetation: Plant growth blocking drains or indicating standing water

deepinspect_to_dacl10k.deepinspect_description: Condition of bridge bearings (elastomeric, pot, rocker types)

dacl10k_notes.bearing_deterioration: Direct 1:1 — cracked elastomeric bearings, corroded steel bearings, missing anchor bolts

deepinspect_to_dacl10k.confidence_modifier: low — bearings often not visible from street level; Street View angle rarely shows bearing shelf

deepinspect_to_dacl10k.deepinspect_description: Condition of expansion joints (compression seals, finger joints, buried joints)

dacl10k_notes.expansion_joint_deterioration: Direct 1:1 — failed seals, missing nosings, debris-filled gaps, stepped joints

deepinspect_to_dacl10k.confidence_modifier: medium — joints visible from road level but often obscured by traffic markings

deepinspect_to_dacl10k.deepinspect_description: Condition of safety railings, parapets, and vehicle restraint systems

dacl10k_notes.protective_equipment_failure: dacl10k defines this as failure of protective/safety equipment — directly maps to damaged railings, missing posts, crash-damaged barriers

deepinspect_to_dacl10k.confidence_modifier: high — railings clearly visible from street level and at road-deck height

deepinspect_to_dacl10k.deepinspect_description: Protective coatings, cathodic protection systems, and waterproofing

dacl10k_notes.paint_failure: Coating breakdown — primary evidence for protective system failure
dacl10k_notes.surface_staining: May indicate waterproofing failure or coating degradation

deepinspect_to_dacl10k.deepinspect_description: Condition of bridge piers including base, shaft, and cap
deepinspect_to_dacl10k.dacl10k_notes_general: Pier condition is assessed by detecting the set of defect classes present on pier elements. No dacl10k class specifically for piers — element identification is by location context.
deepinspect_to_dacl10k.confidence_modifier: medium — pier base often obscured by vegetation, water, or street furniture

deepinspect_to_dacl10k.deepinspect_description: Condition of bridge abutments, wing walls, and approach fills
deepinspect_to_dacl10k.dacl10k_notes_general: Abutment condition uses same defect classes as pier condition. Vegetation on abutments indicates moisture accumulation and potential backfill drainage issues.
deepinspect_to_dacl10k.confidence_modifier: low — abutments often below road level or obscured by approach embankments
